# cmccloudv2_rds_cluster (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_flavor" "os_small" {
    name = "db.t1.micro"
}
# create rds_cluster 
resource "cmccloudv2_rds_cluster" "rds_cluster1" {
    billing_mode                  = "monthly"
    name                          = "rds-hrdm"
    flavor_id                     = "${data.cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_flavor.os_small.id}"
    volume_size                   = 20
    db_engine                     = "mysql"
    db_version                    = "8.0.42-33.1"
    subnet_id                     = "7f0dca91-6e37-4d41-820a-e32faec487d3"
    mode                          = "cluster"
    cluster_size                  = 1
    proxy_size                    = 1
    enable_backup                 = false
    enable_pitr                   = true
    backup_schedule               = "0 0 * * *"
    backup_retention              = 3
    enable_storage_autoscaling    = false
    storage_autoscaling_threshold = 70
    storage_autoscaling_increment = 10    
	tags {
        key = "env"
        value = "prod"
    }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_mode` (String) The billing mode of the Postgres instance
- `cluster_size` (Number) Number of database instances in the cluster.
- `db_engine` (String) The database engine (e.g., postgres, mysql) for the RDS cluster.
- `db_version` (String) The version of the database engine.
- `enable_backup` (Boolean) Enable automated daily backup.
- `enable_storage_autoscaling` (Boolean) Whether to enable storage autoscaling.
- `flavor_id` (String) The ID of the flavor for the RDS cluster.
- `mode` (String) The operation mode for the cluster, currently support `cluster` only.
- `name` (String) The name of the RDS cluster.
- `proxy_size` (Number) Number of proxy nodes in the cluster.
- `subnet_id` (String) The subnet ID associated with the RDS cluster.
- `volume_size` (Number) The volume size (in GiB) for the RDS cluster.

### Optional

- `backup_retention` (Number) Number of backup retention days.
- `backup_schedule` (String) Cron schedule string for automated backups.
- `enable_pitr` (Boolean) Enable Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR).
- `storage_autoscaling_increment` (Number) Storage autoscaling increment (GiB) when triggered.
- `storage_autoscaling_threshold` (Number) Storage autoscaling threshold (percent).
- `tags` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Created time
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `lb_vip_ipaddress` (String) Load Balancer VIP IP Address
- `status` (String) Cluster status

<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `key` (String) The key of the tag
- `value` (String) The value of the tag

- `delete` (String)
